reasoning: Fidelity composite critically low: 0.40 (2/3 dimensions evaluated). Document quality below minimum threshold for publication.

concerns.analysis: An evaluation of the phone numbers listed in the output reveals a mismatch. The phone number listed as 910-564-4194 in the source document on page 3 appears as 910-564-2194 in the output. This is a critical fabrication error.

The attendance tables (ROLL CALL, GUESTS) use a vertical 'N/A' label in the source PDF to indicate that the 'IN PERSON' column is not applicable to an entire group of people. In the rendered HTML, this 'N/A' is placed as text inside a single row (e.g., 'Hartman, JD' for Board Members, 'Conner, Stephanie' for Staff, and 'Clewis, Amy' for Guests). More critically, in the 'GUESTS' table, the distinction between 'VIA MS TEAMS/PHONE' and 'NOT PRESENT' is lost. In the source (page 3), Amy Clewis has a
concerns.source_pdf_quote: In the source PDF (page 3), the GUESTS table shows Amy Clewis with an 'X' in the 'NOT PRESENT' column (far right), whereas other guests like Ron Adams have an 'X' in the 'VIA MS TEAMS/PHONE' column (middle).
concerns.output_quote: In the HTML screenshot, the GUESTS table shows all guests, including Amy Clewis, with an 'X' in the third column. The 'N/A' label from the 'IN PERSON' column is incorrectly rendered as text specifically for Amy Clewis ('Clewis, Amy' | 'N/A' | 'X').
concerns.location: GUESTS table, following the phone numbers list

concerns.analysis: The data from the 'ROLL CALL VOTE' table (originally on page 4 of the PDF) is duplicated in the HTML output. Immediately following the table, a new section titled 'NORTH CAROLINA 911 BOARD MEETING ROLL CALL VOTE' repeats the exact same information (Member Name and their Vote/Status) in a two-column 'Field/Value' list format. This is a duplication of body content that does not exist in the source material.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Source PDF Page 4 ends with the 'ROLL CALL VOTE' table.
concerns.output_quote: HTML output follows the 'ROLL CALL VOTE' table with a 'Field/Value' list (e.g., 'Bone, David: true', 'Boyette, Eric: true') repeating the same data.
concerns.location: Immediately following the first 'ROLL CALL VOTE' table

concerns.description: Minor text differences beyond acceptable reformatting
concerns.analysis: There are two minor defects found. First, in Section 11 (Technology Committee Report), the output substitutes the name 'Mr. Means' with 'Mr. Meeks' in the first paragraph. Second, in element 33 (a duplicate/interpretive version of the roll call vote table), the original values 'Y' and 'Not Present' are altered to 'true' and 'false', which changes the semantic information (as 'Not Present' is not equivalent to a negative vote).
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Mr. Means reported migrations had resumed...; Y; Not Present
concerns.output_quote: Mr. Meeks reported migrations had resumed...; true; false
concerns.location: Technology Committee Report (element 54) on page 6; element 33 on page 4
